title: Setting field value
excerpt:
Hi team ! 
In the setting field configuration, 
What is the meaning of the “Required for onboarding” checkbox and the alias input field? 
Thanks

posts.author: Baruhshmil (Baruh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team !
In the setting field configuration,
What is the meaning of the “Required for onboarding” checkbox and the alias input field?
Thanks

image715×477 20.1 KB

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Required for onboarding means that the field must be filled out or selected before the onboarding process can be completed. It says that certain information is collected from the user during the onboarding phase which is essential for integration into the organization.

The alias input field allows you to define an alternative name or label for a field. It provides a way to customize the display name of a field without changing its actual field name.

Hope this is helpful.
